prompt: A dark, damp 19th-century British cobblestone street at night, shrouded in thick fog. Two- and three-story brick buildings with worn facades line both sides, featuring tall narrow windows with faint warm light. Dim yellow gas streetlamps cast weak pools of light at intervals along the street. The cobblestone surface is wet and reflective. Visibility is heavily reduced by the dense fog, with the far end of the street dissolving into mist. The color palette is cold and muted with film-grain texture and a camera timestamp overlay (OCT 26 18:43:21 REC) in the bottom-right corner. To the right, a narrow alley opens between two buildings, disappearing into complete darkness. To the left, a weathered wooden door is set into a brick wall beneath a faint lantern. Ahead, the shadowy figure in a dark trench coat and hat moves slowly through the fog, occasionally obscured by thicker patches of mist. The street continues into obscurity, with more gas lamps flickering weakly in the distance. First-person viewer. First-person handheld camera POV at eye level, looking straight down the foggy street. No visible character body. A shadowy figure in a dark trench coat and hat is faintly visible in the distance, walking away through the mist. The slight camera shake simulates a documentary or found-footage style.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A dark, damp 19th-century British cobblestone street at night is shrouded in thick fog. Two- and three-story brick buildings with worn facades line both sides of the street, featuring tall narrow windows that emit faint warm light. Dim yellow gas streetlamps cast weak pools of light at intervals along the street. The cobblestone surface is wet and reflective. Visibility is heavily reduced by the dense fog, with the far end of the street dissolving into mist. The scene has a cold and muted color palette with film-grain texture, and a camera timestamp overlay reading OCT 26 18:43:21 REC is present in the bottom-right corner. A shadowy figure wearing a dark trench coat and hat moves slowly through the fog ahead, occasionally obscured by thicker patches of mist. More gas lamps flicker weakly in the distant fog.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the right of the street, a narrow alley opens between two buildings and disappears into complete darkness. To the left of the street, a weathered wooden door is set into a brick wall beneath a faint lantern.
